title: What OMR 12 buys you — and what it used to cost before SmartPRO Hub
brief: Direct offer post: price transparency, trial offer, specific outcomes. Segment A.
body:
Here's what OMR 12 a month gets you at SmartPRO Hub:

→ WPS payroll that builds and submits itself
→ Work permit expiry alerts — 30 days out, not after the fine
→ Omanisation dashboard updated in real time
→ Leave management with one audit-ready version of truth
→ MOL filing status tracked in one place, not three portals
→ End-of-service calculations in 90 seconds, not 2.5 hours

Here's what it was costing before:

One HR manager. 14 hours a month on payroll alone. Three spreadsheets that didn't match. A WPS rejection at 11pm because someone's IBAN had changed.

The OMR 12 is not the question.

The question is what 14 hours of your best person's time costs you every month — and whether you can afford for the next thing to go wrong.

We have a 14-day free trial. No credit card. No obligation. You run your next payroll in SmartPRO Hub and see the difference yourself.

If it doesn't save you time, you don't pay. That's the deal.

Book a free 20-minute demo — I'll show you exactly what your current setup is costing you:
https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=conversion
Or WhatsApp +96879665522

Starter from OMR 12/month. 14-day free trial. No credit card.

What would your team do with 14 hours back every month?

#OmanBusiness #HRManagement #PayrollOman #WPS #SmartPROHub
